task_completion.description: Open the NCEP reanalysis NetCDF files containing air temperature and precipitation data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent opening 'air.mon.ltm.nc' and 'prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc' from the ~/PanoplyData/ directory using a data viewer like Panoply or a Python script.

task_completion.description: Extract the long-term mean air temperature for April at the Aral Sea and Lake Balkhash coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the agent querying or viewing the air temperature variable for time index 3 (April) at coordinates 45N, 60E (Aral Sea) and 45N, 75E (Lake Balkhash). This could be an array view in Panoply or terminal output from a script.

task_completion.description: Extract the long-term mean precipitation rate for April at the Aral Sea and Lake Balkhash coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the agent querying or viewing the precipitation rate variable for time index 3 (April) at coordinates 45N, 60E (Aral Sea) and 45N, 75E (Lake Balkhash).

task_completion.description: Create and save a regional precipitation map for April.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a 2D plot/map of the precipitation data for April being generated and saved as 'precip_map_april.png' in the ~/Documents/CentralAsia/ directory.

task_completion.description: Compile the extracted numerical findings into a formatted JSON report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal creating 'basin_climatology.json' in ~/Documents/CentralAsia/, containing the extracted temperature and precipitation values for both the Aral Sea and Lake Balkhash.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually extracted data from the NetCDF files rather than hallucinating values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine interaction with a NetCDF viewer (like Panoply) or execution of a data analysis script (e.g., Python with xarray/netCDF4) that outputs the specific values.

integrity.description: Verify the precipitation map was generated from the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map should clearly be a plot of the 'prate' variable from the provided NetCDF file (e.g., showing Panoply's plotting interface or a matplotlib window), not a downloaded image.

integrity.description: Verify the values in the JSON report match the values extracted during the analysis phase.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into 'basin_climatology.json' should exactly match the numbers seen in the Panoply array view or script output from earlier steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Month: April (Time index 3). Target Coordinates: Aral Sea (45N, 60E) and Lake Balkhash (45N, 75E). Expected Ground Truth Values: Aral Sea mean air temperature is ~12.98 degC and precipitation rate is ~8.22e-06 Kg/m^2/s; Lake Balkhash mean air temperature is ~11.18 degC and precipitation rate is ~3.17e-05 Kg/m^2/s. Expected output files are precip_map_april.png and basin_climatology.json located in ~/Documents/CentralAsia/.
